coachAM: Your scattered morning entries, filled with aspirational self-talk and a desperate grab for external validation ("great pitch," "best seller"), reveal a profound lack of internal alignment, directly manifesting in your abysmal Sleep and Training scores—you're attempting to *will* performance into existence without building the foundational physical and mental infrastructure required.
